name: title.anvilcraft.patchouli.advanced.heated_block
pages: $(thing)可加热方块$()有若干温度等级，随时间自动降温 $(br2)$(thing)可加热方块$()可通过外部加热升温并维持高温状态

pages.title: 温度等级
pages.text: $(li)反映了方块的温度 $(li)$(item)钨块$()、$(item)下界合金块$()具有5个温度等级：$(thing)普通$()、$(thing)高温$()、$(thing)红热$()、$(thing)炽热$()、$(thing)白炽$()

pages.title: 持续时间
pages.text: $(li)若$(thing)持续时间$()随时间自动归零，则使温度等级降低一级，持续时间重置为10s $(li)外部加热使$(thing)持续时间$()增加 $(li)$(thing)持续时间$()存在上限($(thing)20分钟$())$(li)比较器可以检测持续时间，输出红石信号

pages.title: 加热
pages.text: 不同的加热方式具有不同的$(thing)加热能力$()(决定最终将方块加热哪个温度等级) $(br)加热时：$(li)当温度等级$(thing)低于$()加热能力，立刻抬升至相对应的温度等级$(li)当温度等级$(thing)高于$()加热能力，则不受影响。$(li)若温度等级与加热能力相$(thing)匹配$()，则可加热方块的持续时间会被增加。

pages.title: 破坏与放置
pages.text: $(li)挖掘方块时，如果工具没有$(item)精准采集/熔炼$()附魔，则温度等级降低一级 $(li)放置方块时，温度等级降低一级

pages.title: 高温方块
pages.text: 不是$(thing)普通$()等级的可加热方块称为$(thing)高温方块$()，可以为$(l:power/heat_collection#unchanged_block)集热器$()提供给热量以发电。$(br2)$(thing)红热$()、$(thing)炽热$()、$(thing)白炽$()等级的方块会烫伤踩在上面的生物，分别造成1, 2, 4点伤害。 $(br2)$(thing)红热$()、$(thing)炽热$()、$(thing)白炽$()等级的方块接触水一段时间后，和海绵类似，蒸发距离4, 6, 8以内的水。

pages.title: 加热方式
pages.text: 后文将依次介绍现阶段的加热方式： $(li)加热器 $(li)矿物涌泉 $(li)定日镜 $(li)激光 $(li)等离子喷流(消耗原油)
(item)Heater$() can be used to heat heatable blocks. It can heat block on top to Heated Tier and add 0.1 second every seconds.

当$(l:struct/When the corners of $(l:struct/mineral_fountain#mineral_fountain)Mineral Fountain$() is full of lava, it can be used to heat heatable blocks. It can heat block on top to Redhot Tier and add 1 second every seconds.
手持$(item)定日镜$()右键绑定方块后。不同数量的定日镜会将$(thing)可加热方块$()$(n)及其之上$()的方块加热为不同等级并每秒增加4秒持续时间。 $(li)4个：高温  12个：红热 $(li)32个：炽热 64个：白炽

pages.title: Laser
pages.text: $(l:power/laser_system)激光$()根据激光等级将$(thing)可加热方块$()加热为不同等级并每秒增加0.1秒持续时间。 $(li)1级：高温  4级：红热 $(li)16级：炽热  64级：白炽

pages.title: Plasma Jets
pages.text: When the bottom of $(l:apply/oil)Fire Cauldron$() is working $(item)Heater$() and width 1x1 height $(thing)8$() above is air, create a $(item)Plasma Jets$(). $(br2)If the horizontal sides of this block all have a block (as tube wall,) raise itself 1 block. The highest raising is four times.$(br2)The entities in the jets or in the middle of the jets and the cauldron will get fire damage as 4 times that of lava.

pages.title: Example structure
pages.text: This schematic diagram shows an effective structure

pages: t will try these every gird tick:$(li)Heat$(thing)Common Heated Block$() to Glowing Tier and add 0.1 seconds to duration. $()$(li)If any layer of tube wall accord with two sides in a same axis is $(item)Magnet Block$() and two sides in another axis is $(thing)Common Heated Block$(), heat the Common Heated Block in this layer to Glowing Tier and add 1 seconds to duration. At the same time, produce 256 charges on the $(thing)Common Heated Block$().

pages.title: Consume the oil
pages.text: Plasma Jets need to consume the oil in the fire cauldron to maintain. It will add 5 minutes to duration time every level consumed. The maximum duration time is 10 minutes. If the consuming will let duration time over than the maximum, it will be skip.
